    • prescriptionsByDoctorReport

      public void prescriptionsByDoctorReport(String name)
      Searches for a doctor by name and generates a report of all prescriptions they have prescribed within the system.

      The method first searches the list of doctors for a case-sensitive name match. If found, it iterates through all registered prescriptions to find matches based on the doctor's unique ID.

      Parameters:
      name - The name of the doctor to search for (case-sensitive).
      See Also:
      • Doctor
      • Prescription

    • searchMedicationByName

      public void searchMedicationByName(String name)
      Searches for a medication by name and generates a report of all prescriptions they have prescribed within the system.

      The method first searches the list of medications for a case-sensitive name match. If found, it iterates through all medications to find matches based on the medications name.

      Parameters:
      name - The exact name of the medication to search for (case-sensitive).
      See Also:
      • Medication

    • addPrescription

      public void addPrescription(Prescription prescription)
